caption:
📍 Location: Uoi Tego Tenjinbashi-suji Shopping Street 5 Chome, Kita Ward, Osaka

🕒 Hours 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM 5:00 PM – 9:00 PM (Takeout: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM)

💰 Price Unaju (2/5 eel) – ¥2,500（$17） Unaju (2/3 eel) – ¥3,600（$24） Unaju Special (1 whole eel) – ¥5,200（$35） Hitsumabushi – ¥3,200（$21）

Comment “Unagi” and we’ll DM you the details.

#osaka #unagi #eel #localfood #japantrip pr
transcript: What's the best restaurant in Osaka? Ummmm... Uoi Why? 150 years ago, the Uo-nagi is the most delicious. Okay, let's go! If you are looking for the best Uo-nagi experience in Osaka, check this out! Uoi is a historic Uo-nagi company with over 159 years of history. Here, they receive only the freshest Japanese eel, prepared on the same day by highly skilled craftsmen who clean each eel quickly and precisely. Then, each eel is slowly and carefully grilled, one by one, over traditional charcoal, bringing out deep flavor and aroma. Here we go! This is their Uo-nagi bowl and Hitsumabushi. Look at this golden brown eel! Crispy on the outside and packed with pure umami. For your Hitsumabushi, pour the dashi over the rice and enjoy it in Ochatsuki style. Warm, comforting, and full of local flavor. Comment Uo-nagi for more info.

transcript_segments.text: What's the best restaurant in Osaka?
150 years ago, the Uo-nagi is the most delicious.
If you are looking for the best Uo-nagi experience in Osaka, check this out!
Uoi is a historic Uo-nagi company with over 159 years of history.
Here, they receive only the freshest Japanese eel,
prepared on the same day by highly skilled craftsmen who clean each eel quickly and precisely.
Then, each eel is slowly and carefully grilled, one by one, over traditional charcoal,
bringing out deep flavor and aroma.
This is their Uo-nagi bowl and Hitsumabushi.
Look at this golden brown eel!
Crispy on the outside and packed with pure umami.
For your Hitsumabushi, pour the dashi over the rice and enjoy it in Ochatsuki style.
Warm, comforting, and full of local flavor.
